content:
I am pleased to share the successful completion of the Summer Internship Programme 2026 at Bihar Judicial Academy, Patna.

This internship offered invaluable exposure to the workings of the judicial system, legal research, and judicial administration. Under the mentorship of Shri Mukesh Kumar, Deputy Director, I concentrated on an assignment related to the Criminal Justice Foundation, analyzing landmark judgments such as D.K. Basu, Joginder Kumar, Arnesh Kumar, and Lalita Kumari. Additionally, I examined the rights of an accused during investigations under the BNSS, covering FIR, investigation, charge sheet, and cognizable trials.

I extend my heartfelt gratitude to the Director of Bihar Judicial Academy and all the esteemed officers and mentors for their guidance, encouragement, and the opportunity to learn in such a prestigious institution.

This experience has deepened my understanding of criminal law and motivated me to continue my learning and contributions to the legal profession. I look forward to applying these insights in my future legal journey.



#BiharJudicialAcademy #Internship #LawStudent #LegalResearch #BNSS #CriminalJustice #Judiciary #LegalEducation #FutureLawyer #Patna #Learning #ProfessionalGrowth
